name: freedom-and-dignity-project
description: This repository is now organized around the architecture described in the branch chats: a document-first policy platform with pillar docs, a cross-domain system-rules layer, strategy materials, and a structured catalog of tracked policy items.

scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:e2e
scripts.logs:sync: echo 'Set your S3 bucket: aws s3 sync sources/chat-logs/copilot/ s3://YOUR-BUCKET/copilot-chat-logs/ --storage-class STANDARD_IA'
